languages.text: Осколок К'тан, отданный Тразину Неисчислимому Вольным Торговцем фон Валанциус, бесследно исчез, как и его новый владелец. Казалось, что все несчастья, уготованные Простору Коронус грядущим пробуждением звездного божества, сгинули вместе с ним.

After being given to Trazyn the Infinite by Rogue Trader von Valancius, the C'tan Shard vanished without a trace along with its new owner. And it seemed that all the calamities heralded for the Koronus Expanse with the Star God's impending awakening vanished along with them.
languages.original_text: Осколок К'тан, отданный Тразину Неисчислимому Вольным Торговцем фон Валанциус, бесследно исчез, как и его новый владелец. Казалось, что все несчастья, уготованные Простору Коронус грядущим пробуждением звездного божества, сгинули вместе с ним.

traits.locale_text: After being given to Trazyn the Infinite by Rogue Trader von Valancius, the C'tan Shard vanished without a trace along with its new owner. And it seemed that all the calamities heralded for the Koronus Expanse with the Star God's impending awakening vanished along with them.

After being given to Trazyn the Infinite by Rogue Trader von Valancius, the C'tan Shard vanished without a trace along with its new owner. And it seemed that all the calamities heralded for the Koronus Expanse with the Star God's impending awakening vanished along with them.

After being given to Trazyn the Infinite by Rogue Trader von Valancius, the C'tan Shard vanished without a trace along with its new owner. And it seemed that all the calamities heralded for the Koronus Expanse with the Star God's impending awakening vanished along with them.

languages.text: Después de que {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente von Valancius se lo entregara a Trazyn el Infinito, el fragmento de C'tan se desvaneció sin rastro junto con su nuevo propietario. Y parecía que todas las calamidades pronosticadas para la Extensión de Koronus con el inminente despertar del dios estelar se desvanecerían con él.
languages.original_text: After being given to Trazyn the Infinite by Rogue Trader von Valancius, the C'tan Shard vanished without a trace along with its new owner. And it seemed that all the calamities heralded for the Koronus Expanse with the Star God's impending awakening vanished along with them.

traits.locale_text: Después de que {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente von Valancius se lo entregara a Trazyn el Infinito, el fragmento de C'tan se desvaneció sin rastro junto con su nuevo propietario. Y parecía que todas las calamidades pronosticadas para la Extensión de Koronus con el inminente despertar del dios estelar se desvanecerían con él.

languages.text: 当星神碎片被行商浪人冯·瓦兰修斯交给无限者特拉金后，它便与自己的新主人一道消失得无影无踪。而那些因星神即将苏醒而悬在科罗努斯扩区头上的灾厄，似乎也一并消散了。
languages.original_text: After being given to Trazyn the Infinite by Rogue Trader von Valancius, the C'tan Shard vanished without a trace along with its new owner. And it seemed that all the calamities heralded for the Koronus Expanse with the Star God's impending awakening vanished along with them.

traits.locale_text: 当星神碎片被行商浪人冯·瓦兰修斯交给无限者特拉金后，它便与自己的新主人一道消失得无影无踪。而那些因星神即将苏醒而悬在科罗努斯扩区头上的灾厄，似乎也一并消散了。

languages.text: Nachdem {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin} von Valancius Trazyn dem Unendlichen das C'Tan-Fragment übergeben hatte, verschwand es mit seinem neuen Besitzer spurlos. Und wie es schien, verschwanden mit ihnen auch die durch das nahende Erwachen des Sternengottes verkündeten Katastrophen für die Koronus-Ausdehnung.
languages.original_text: After being given to Trazyn the Infinite by Rogue Trader von Valancius, the C'tan Shard vanished without a trace along with its new owner. And it seemed that all the calamities heralded for the Koronus Expanse with the Star God's impending awakening vanished along with them.

traits.locale_text: Nachdem {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin} von Valancius Trazyn dem Unendlichen das C'Tan-Fragment übergeben hatte, verschwand es mit seinem neuen Besitzer spurlos. Und wie es schien, verschwanden mit ihnen auch die durch das nahende Erwachen des Sternengottes verkündeten Katastrophen für die Koronus-Ausdehnung.

languages.text: Une fois livrée à Trazyn l'Infini par {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} von Valancius, l'Écharde C'tan disparut sans laisser de traces en même temps que son nouveau propriétaire. Et toutes les calamités promises aux Étendues de Koronus dans le sillage de l'éveil imminent du Dieu Stellaire semblèrent écartées par la même occasion.
languages.original_text: After being given to Trazyn the Infinite by Rogue Trader von Valancius, the C'tan Shard vanished without a trace along with its new owner. And it seemed that all the calamities heralded for the Koronus Expanse with the Star God's impending awakening vanished along with them.

traits.locale_text: Une fois livrée à Trazyn l'Infini par {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} von Valancius, l'Écharde C'tan disparut sans laisser de traces en même temps que son nouveau propriétaire. Et toutes les calamités promises aux Étendues de Koronus dans le sillage de l'éveil imminent du Dieu Stellaire semblèrent écartées par la même occasion.

languages.text: Hür Tacir von Valancius tarafından Mutlak Trazyn'e verildikten sonra C'tan Parçası, yeni sahibiyle birlikte iz bırakmadan ortadan kayboldu. Görünen o ki Yıldız Tanrı'nın yaklaşan uyanışıyla, Koronus Enginliği için habercisi olan tüm felaketler de onlarla birlikte yok oldu.
languages.original_text: After being given to Trazyn the Infinite by Rogue Trader von Valancius, the C'tan Shard vanished without a trace along with its new owner. And it seemed that all the calamities heralded for the Koronus Expanse with the Star God's impending awakening vanished along with them.

traits.locale_text: Hür Tacir von Valancius tarafından Mutlak Trazyn'e verildikten sonra C'tan Parçası, yeni sahibiyle birlikte iz bırakmadan ortadan kayboldu. Görünen o ki Yıldız Tanrı'nın yaklaşan uyanışıyla, Koronus Enginliği için habercisi olan tüm felaketler de onlarla birlikte yok oldu.

languages.text: ローグ・トレーダーのフォン・ヴァランシウスによってトラズン・ザ・インフィニットに贈られたこのクタンの断片は、その新しい所有者と共に消え去った。そして、星神が目覚めることで予言された災厄も、共に消え去ったように見えた。
languages.original_text: After being given to Trazyn the Infinite by Rogue Trader von Valancius, the C'tan Shard vanished without a trace along with its new owner. And it seemed that all the calamities heralded for the Koronus Expanse with the Star God's impending awakening vanished along with them.

traits.locale_text: ローグ・トレーダーのフォン・ヴァランシウスによってトラズン・ザ・インフィニットに贈られたこのクタンの断片は、その新しい所有者と共に消え去った。そして、星神が目覚めることで予言された災厄も、共に消え去ったように見えた。
